Publish.LongDescription:
## AdvancedTPM
Advanced per-resource tax and production manager with an AI advisor and in-depth company browser. Configure taxes for individual resources, monitor production and consumption, and get adaptive recommendations from a learning advisor.
## Key features
- Per-resource tax sliders and real-time production/consumption bars - Category grouping: Agriculture, Forestry, Mining, Oil, Office, Entertainment, Commercial - Company Browser: sortable table, efficiency factor analysis, happiness indicator, and camera jump - Auto-Tax engine with configurable rules and per-resource min/max ranges - Adaptive Learning Advisor: records outcomes and provides confidence-weighted recommendations
For full details, screenshots and installation steps please see the project README or edit the mod page on the hosting site.
Publish.ChangeLog:
## Changelog 1.1.0 ## v1.1.0 - Districts Residential & Services Overhaul
**Released:** 2026-05-13
### Added - **Districts Dashboard:** Complete overhaul featuring reorderable cards, settings gear, demographic metrics, and district-level policies. - **Happiness Aggregation:** Integrated happiness metrics into the Districts UI panel. - **Residential Browser:** Filterable UI for residential housing data (themes, densities, occupancy, etc.) complete with residents/employees columns and dynamic rows. - **Services Browser:** Filterable panel for tracking city service buildings with metrics. - **Advisor Panel Fixes:** Stabilized the layout of the adaptive learning advisor logs and UI components.
### Changed - Refined and stabilized auto-resizing row components and panel layouts. - Resolved C# missing symbol bugs regarding DistrictHappinessData components and system states. - Enhanced robust image icon mapping for business types and resources in the UI.
